ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to access the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, book, conference paper) */,
  "peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is peer-reviewed */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is open access */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was submitted */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accepted */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., submitted, accepted, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Primary research field of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations the author has received */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Total number of publications the author has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in the associative table */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "contribution_order" INTEGER /* Order of contribution of the author to the publication */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution the author was affiliated with at the time of publication */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Brief description of the author's contribution to the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) for the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the journal's publisher */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the journal is open access */,
  "issn_digital" TEXT /* Digital ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN of the journal */,
  "journal_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the journal */,
  "editorial_board" TEXT /* List of the editorial board members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the publication */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the author in the project */,
  "project_funding" REAL /* Funding amount for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_links_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_links_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* IDs of the collaborators */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "project_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "cited_by_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that contains the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., in-text, footnote) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation was made */,
  "citation_page" INTEGER /* Page number where the citation appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_by_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_by_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the user */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations the user has received */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Total number of publications the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_logs" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission log */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., submitted, under review) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was completed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "final_decision" TEXT /* Final decision (e.g., accept, reject) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the publication has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the publication has received */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "views_by_month" TEXT /* Number of views by month */,
  "downloads_by_month" TEXT /* Number of downloads by month */,
  "citations_by_year" TEXT /* Number of citations by year */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Calculated impact score for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
